series_metadata.series_description: To record all requests for access, agency moves, agency merges, disconnect, cancellation of service, terminal additions or moves, or other agency modifications. Requests are submitted on form LEADS 0013 and logged for processing.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan and upload, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retained in Leads Portal for 3 years after completion date of the activity/task, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
